title: The  black arrow
description: Richard Shelton is a young knight during the Wars of the Roses. We see him ascend and rescue his lady love. He then seeks revenge against his father's murderer, but when the evidence points towards his guardian he is forced to go into hiding. He joins the band of outlaws known as the Black Arrow.
subjects: Wars of the Roses (Great Britain : 1455-1485) fast (OCoLC)fst01355312
